title: Zero Trust Policy
content: Zero trust requires continuous verification of every user and device. Access is granted using least privilege and explicitly validated identity signals. Network location is not trusted by default.

title: RBAC Guidelines
content: Role-based access control maps permissions to roles such as admin, editor, and viewer. Users receive only the permissions required to perform their job. Periodic reviews remove unnecessary privilege.

title: Incident Playbook
content: Security incidents should be triaged by severity, assigned an incident commander, and documented with timestamps. Post-incident analysis includes root cause, customer impact, and preventive controls.
